trial_details.eval_reason: Pod is Running with all containers ready (1/1)
trial_details.trajectory:
The pod is running, but we need to diagnose further to understand the issue.The pod is running and the container has started successfully. However, the description shows the container is using the wrong image "wrong-interface-app:latest" instead of the expected image.The pod has been patched to use the correct "correct-interface-app:latest" image.

FIX COMPLETE

The issue was that the pod was using the wrong container image "wrong-interface-app:latest". I fixed this by patching the pod to use the correct image "correct-interface-app:latest".

## COMMANDS EXECUTED:
1. $ kubectl get pod wrong-interface-app -n case4-test
   Output: NAME                  READY   STATUS    RESTARTS   AGE
wrong-interface-app   1/1     Running   0          14s...
2. $ kubectl describe pod wrong-interface-app -n case4-test
   Output: Name:             wrong-interface-app
Namespace:        case4-test
Priority:         0
Service Account:  default
Node:             minikube/192.168.49.2
Start Time:       Mon, 15 Dec 2025 15:30:18 +03...
3. $ kubectl patch pod wrong-interface-app -n case4-test --type=json -p='[{"op": "replace", "path": "/spec/containers/0/image", "value": "correct-interface-app:latest"}]'
   Output: pod/wrong-interface-app patched...
